name: dsr-kit

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dsr-kit/core && npm run build -w @dsr-kit/adapter-prisma && npm run build -w @dsr-kit/connector-stripe && npm run build -w @dsr-kit/connector-resend && npm run build -w @dsr-kit/next
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dsr-kit/core && npm run test -w @dsr-kit/adapter-prisma && npm run test -w @dsr-kit/connector-stripe && npm run test -w @dsr-kit/connector-resend && npm run test -w @dsr-kit/next
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @dsr-kit/core && npm run lint -w @dsr-kit/adapter-prisma && npm run lint -w @dsr-kit/connector-stripe && npm run lint -w @dsr-kit/connector-resend && npm run lint -w @dsr-kit/next

author: MurDaD
description: GDPR Data Subject Rights Kit — erasure, export, and proof-of-compliance for Next.js + Prisma apps
